allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\(':memory:'\); db.pragma\('journal_mode = WAL'\); console.log\('WAL pragma:', db.pragma\('journal_mode'\)\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = ON'\); console.log\('Foreign keys:', db.pragma\('foreign_keys'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { initDb, closeDb } = require\('./server/db.js'\); console.log\('Exports:'\); console.log\('- initDb:', typeof initDb\); console.log\('- closeDb:', typeof closeDb\); console.log\('- Database type exported'\); const db = initDb\(':memory:'\); console.log\('initDb returns:', typeof db\); closeDb\(db\);")
